## Type of change

<!-- Should match the branch prefix from /new-branch -->

- [ ] `milestone/` — planned milestone work
- [ ] `feature/` — new functionality
- [ ] `fix/` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs/` — documentation or process/tooling only, no app code
